message:
feat(harness): Implement Agent Harness reference application (bd-2kj)

- Add complete Agent Harness in ftui-harness main.rs demonstrating:
  - Inline mode with streaming logs and stable UI chrome
  - Elm/Bubbletea-style Model/Update/View pattern
  - LogViewer, StatusLine, TextInput, Spinner widgets
  - Keyboard handling (Enter, Escape, PageUp/Down, Ctrl+C)

- Fix Text.style() method to use field access instead of method call
- Remove unused imports in virtualized.rs
- Fix LogRing iterator return types for clippy compliance

Closes bd-2kj (Build Agent Harness reference application)
Unblocks: bd-2ky9, bd-wo2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
